title: DepressionAI
description: DepressionAI is an Amazon Alexa Skill intended to help folks who are suffering from depression by encouraging them to perform daily tasks. It can also detect suicidal intent and provide information about the National Suicide Prevention Hotline. This was built during the 2018 Valley Hackathon, and as such the core development (including the primary intents) was done over 24 hours.

title: ExtempAssist
description: Extemporaneous speaking (extemp) is a competitive Speech and Debate event practiced at various levels from middle school to college. Speakers are given a question surrounding current events and are given 30 minutes to prep a seven minute speech. Speakers must cite the sources they referred to during their prep time, and national finalists can cite upwards of 20 sources in one speech. This tool scrapes a curated listed of news sites relevant to NFA and AFA extemp topic areas, summarizes each article with a custom Spacy-based summarizer, and then indexes each article in ElasticSearch. I used the React-based ElasticUI for creating an interactive search interface atop ElasticSearch.
